name: Jellyfin Canopy
description: Jellyfin Canopy is an independent fork and extensive modernization of Jellyfin Enhanced, providing an integrated suite of playback, discovery, customization and media-management features for Jellyfin 12.
overview: An integrated suite of playback, discovery, customization and media-management features for Jellyfin 12.

versions.changelog:
- fix: preserve compilation context so coverlet can instrument on SDK 10.0.3xx
 - fix: bump coverlet.collector 6.0.4 -> 10.0.1
 - fix: make the dockerized e2e seed resilient in CI
 - ci: drop workflows that require GitHub Advanced Security or a public repo
 - ci: skip GHAS/public-only jobs while the repository is private
 - ci: touch every workflow file so Actions registers them
 - ci: adapt workflows to the Jellyfin Elevate repo
 - fix: route all contribution and support links to this repo
 - feat: embed ratings.css in the plugin DLL with this repo as source of truth
 - feat!: rebrand as Jellyfin Elevate — independent fork of Jellyfin Enhanced
 - docs: round-7 certification sweep — 6 final corrections
 - fix(e2e): harden trace harness CLI and cold-load retry
 - test(e2e): pin details view-cache chip placement across cached views
 - fix(client): close the same view-cache traps in arr tag-links, Letterboxd links and discovery
 - fix(client): resolve details-page injections through the visible view for the current item
 - docs: document the performance trace capture harness
 - feat(e2e): add real-browser performance trace capture harness
 - docs: round-6 exhaustive UI-label crosswalk — 79 verified corrections
 - docs: round-5 accuracy pass — fix 13 verified residuals incl. Random Button + release-dates coverage
 - docs: round-4 accuracy pass — fix 14 verified residual inaccuracies
 - docs: round-3 accuracy pass — fix 23 verified residual inaccuracies
 - docs: round-2 accuracy pass — fix 52 verified residual inaccuracies
 - docs: round-1 accuracy pass — fix 61 verified inaccuracies against the code
 - fix(server): validate registered devices and keep the heartbeat honest
 - fix(server): scope config-changed pushes to sessions that run JE
 - fix(client): soft wait budgets count visible time only
 - fix(client): close review findings from the adversarial pass
 - test(e2e): late-load resilience spec — transient failures still render
 - docs: add R9 fail-open rule to the performance doctrine
 - fix(client): stop poisoning processed state on slow boots and dropped work
 - fix(seerr): transient status failures no longer disable features
 - fix(details): retry transient failures instead of caching them for an hour
 - fix(seerr): fail-open readiness waits on detail and list pages
 - fix(spoiler-guard): close residual review findings
 - fix(spoiler-guard): close review findings from the adversarial pass
 - test(spoiler-guard): committed e2e spec and TV-series seed with watch state
 - docs(spoiler-guard): feature and settings pages, nav, structure updates
 - feat(spoiler-guard): locale strings for all 26 languages
 - feat(spoiler-guard): typed client module on the core platform layer
 - feat(spoiler-guard): HTTP API surface and Seerr auto-request pre-arm
 - feat(spoiler-guard): server-side image blur and metadata strip filters for unwatched content
 - test(client): raise the guard-scan wall-clock backstop so it does not flake under CI contention
 - fix(tags): close the rebuild/flush lost-update window past the guard timeout
 - fix(arr): bound the coming-soon aggregation so all-filtered upstream pages cannot loop forever
 - fix(maintenance): keep the restore record for users whose restore failed during disable
 - fix(seerr): decode query param names so append_to_response cannot be bypassed by encoding
 - test(e2e): seed genre/rating/language metadata so every tag family renders
 - test(e2e): drive the real controls in the settings-persist and console-net specs
 - test(e2e): allowlist the benign boot /Plugins 403 for non-admin sessions
 - fix(settings-panel): dismiss the panel on Escape instead of throwing
 - fix(core): re-sanitize delivery-plugin flags immediately after the public-config merge
 - fix(a11y): release the modal-a11y handle when the settings panel is toggled closed
 - fix(enhanced): restore auto-skip when the skip button mounts at document.body without a body-wide attribute observer
 - fix(services): re-arm the continue-watching drain when work remains after a guard-bail
 - fix(tags): serialize full rebuild against incremental flush
 - fix(tags): do not clear a tag-cache dirty bit set by a flush after the save snapshot
 - fix(config): flush AtomicFile contents to disk before rename for real crash-durability
 - fix(maintenance): persist the restore list before disabling accounts and fail loudly on save errors
 - fix(arr): align the arr tag-prefix whitespace handling with the client
 - fix(arr): fail over to the next url on provable no-commit proxy intercept errors
 - fix(arr): discriminate the title-fallback calendar dedup key to avoid merging distinct items
 - fix(arr): namespace event ids by a unique instance key rather than the display name
 - fix(seerr): drop zero tmdbId in the watchlist sync task so unknown-provider items are not matched
 - fix(arr): include date-only calendar releases whose local day intersects the view
 - fix(arr): paginate coming-soon by raw upstream page length so parental filtering does not truncate it
 - fix(seerr): reject dot-segment paths in the tmdb proxy classifier
 - fix(seerr): reject title-enumerating append_to_response on the raw tmdb proxy for limited callers
 - fix(seerr): block the raw tmdb search/person passthrough that leaks known_for titles
 - docs: document the hardened translation validator, config-bridge tests, and new e2e specs
 - docs(advanced): document new modules, guard tests, CSS-injection and error-surfacing doctrine, and public-config redaction
 - docs(enhanced): document pause-screen delay control, search-page tag hiding, people-tags TTL, and Home continue-watching/next-up filtering
 - docs(seerr,arr): document parental gating, TMDB deny-gate, multi-instance and date-only calendar, TVDB tag sync, and SSRF guard
 - test(e2e): make negative assertions and event observation deterministic
 - test(e2e): exercise core surfaces from a non-admin session
 - test(e2e): prove a per-user setting persists across reload
 - test(e2e): add per-family tag assertions and a search-page hiding spec
 - test(e2e): assert the requests page respects the caller's parental limit
 - test(i18n): harden validate-translations for icon tokens, empty and non-string values
 - test(config): bridge config-page controls and client config-key reads to the descriptor registry
 - test(services): assert the live carrier command is not one web clients act on
 - test(security): pin the ArrUrlGuard DNS-rebind and internal-range decisions
 - test(security): escape-guard verifies producer escape-first and line-pins the allowlist
 - test(seerr): prove the parental filter applies each caller's own limits
 - test(services): S1 scan-guard checks every reviewed subscriber's synchronous body
 - test(config): flip distinctive-golden bools and add a per-property projection guard
 - test(e2e): add optional Seerr/TMDB seeding and skip security specs when unconfigured
 - test(e2e): scope the console 4xx safety net to known-legacy URLs
 - test(pages): satisfy eslint in the plugin-pages script-runner

 - fix(tags): clear the user-access cache on incremental tag-cache flush
